name: biguppetite
description: Big Uppetite internal tools — ATLAS project intelligence and PULSE business reporting.

plugins.name: atlas
plugins.description: Processes Fireflies meeting transcripts, manages Trello boards, maintains client tone profiles, and keeps 12-week client programmes on track.

plugins.name: pulse
plugins.description: Reads Trello boards, analyses project health, and generates clear actionable reports for the team and clients.
